pinpoint.segment.CfnAbout: Updates the configuration, dimension, and other settings for an existing segment.

pinpoint.segment.ApplicationId.Description: The unique identifier for the Amazon Pinpoint application that the segment is associated with.

pinpoint.segment.Dimensions.Description: The criteria that define the dimensions for the segment.

pinpoint.segment.SegmentGroups.Description: The segment group to use and the dimensions to apply to the group's base segments in order to build the segment. A segment group can consist of zero or more base segments. Your request can include only one segment group.

pinpoint.segment.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
